title: New Discs Resource Pack
description: This Resource pack has music from many movies and video games that you will love!
body:
We have put together music from well known movies and video games and put it all into this resource pack! This pack is made by the creators of the Youtube channels "The Blockbuster Bros" and "Foster's Creations" (we didn't change all of the music discs, since they were already great! Here are all of the songs:

Alan Silvestri - Back To The Future
Howard Shore - Concerning Hobbits
Martin O'Donnell and Michael Salvatori - Halo Theme
John Williams - Hedwig's Theme
Samuel Kim - How To Train Your Dragon Theme
David Long - Misty Mountains
Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up
Timothée Chalamet  - Pure Imagination
Stephen Barton and Gordy Haab - Star Wars Jed Survivor Cal Kestis Theme
John Williams - Star Wars Main Theme
Koji Kondo - Super Mario Bros Theme
Doctor P - Tetris theme
Ludwig Göransson - The Mandalorian
Theodore Shapiro and Joseph Shirley - The Mysterious Benedict Society Theme
John Williams  - Welcome to Jurassic Park

Note: we know that "Never Gonna Give You Up" isn't from a movie, but we just HAD to add it so you can troll your friends to your heart's content :)
